title: Danes vote as PM Mette Frederiksen seeks third term after Greenland boost
summary_full: Frederiksen enjoyed a surge in popularity for standing up to the US over Greenland but her support is down on 2022.
summary_public: Frederiksen enjoyed a surge in popularity for standing up to the US over Greenland but her support is down on 2022.
